## Tags
bill, currency, money, payment, funds, transaction, cash, finance, deposit, earnings, income, in, credit, prepaid, growth, increase

## Categories
finance

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/banknote-arrow-up)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::BanknoteArrowUp;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        BanknoteArrowUp { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
